title: ASCI is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: ASCI is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI family as a Subject Matter Expert in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI:
ASCI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI!
